title: Suggested Learning Resources Pathway for Data Analytics with R
description: A flowchart depicting the hierarchical and sequential order of suggested learning resources for Module 5, guiding from foundational concepts to advanced application.
elements: Community Forums (e.g., Stack Overflow, RStudio Community)
relationships: Start with Official R Documentation for foundational knowledge
Proceed to Recommended Textbook Chapters for in-depth theory
Supplement with Online Tutorial Videos for visual learning
Seek help and discuss concepts on Community Forums
Synthesize all learning in a Final Project Exercise
